title: Raw Netherite Reforged
description: Added raw netherite, meaning ancient debris can now be affected by the Fortune enchantment.
body: This mod is a **remake of the Debris Chunk mod**. It introduces raw netherite, which can be smelted into netherite scrap, meaning the Fortune enchantment now affects ancient debris mining. Additionally, netherite nuggets have been added, though netherite tools and armor cannot be smelted into nuggets – since not even lava can destroy them.
